title: Free real estate: GoPix, the banking Trojan living off your memory

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Free real estate: GoPix, the banking Trojan living off your 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/17
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*com.br*'
            - '*correioez0ubcfht9i3.lovehomely*'
            - '*correiotwknx9gu315h.lovehomely*'
            - '*gov.br*'
            - '*www2.banco*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
